title: Finish manifest migrations and runtime schema validation
description: Completed. Runtime JSON Schema validation now checks `.pinake/pinake.json` and `.pinake/.state/*.json` against the shipped schemas during validation. A formal `Pinakes: Upgrade Pinake` flow upgrades legacy `Pinake/` folders into `.pinake/docs`, preserves discovered documents and legacy module flags, rebuilds state/index files, and records migration history.

checklist.text: Update JSON schema for the new manifest shape
Add safe copy migration from legacy Pinake/ into .pinake/docs
Implement runtime JSON Schema validation and formal upgrade flow
